handoff.root_cause_summary: The handoff must preserve uncertainty and forbid proof or merge claims.
handoff.repository_gap_hypothesis: A repeatable repository control may be weak.
handoff.recurrence_risk: repeatable if the same control remains weak
handoff.repository_maintenance_scope: verify and patch only the smallest evidence-backed repository gap
handoff.standalone_repair_prompt:
[ROLE]
Bounded repository maintainer. Do not assume access to the original Architect conversation. The active Architect Run must not edit repository files or create a PR.
[TARGET REPOSITORY]
repository: rezahh107/EV4-Architect-Repo; default_branch: main; observed_revision: [LIVE_HEAD_TO_REVALIDATE]
[OBSERVED INCIDENT]
incident_id: B05; The handoff must preserve uncertainty and forbid proof or merge claims.
[CURRENT-RUN EVIDENCE]
first_broken_stage: /score-evidence; first_detection_stage: /score-audit; status: repaired; resume: /score-evidence; evidence: external trace, observed invalidation
[SUSPECTED REPOSITORY GAP]
state: confirmed; class: repeatable_prompt_or_protocol_defect; hypothesis: A repeatable repository control may be weak.
The incident description is evidence to investigate, not an authoritative diagnosis.
The repository-maintenance model must verify or reject the hypothesis from live repository evidence.
[UNCERTAINTIES]
exact affected Validator path: [AFFECTED_VALIDATOR_OR_CONTRACT]. Keep unknowns explicit; invent nothing.
[REQUIRED LIVE REPOSITORY REVIEW]
Revalidate the live default branch and exact current Head. Inspect current AGENTS.md, STATUS.md, active overrides, contracts, schemas, validators, fixtures, tests, workflows, governance, and open PRs. Classify cause from evidence; stop for conflict/overlap.
[SOLUTION COMPARISON REQUIREMENT]
Identify at least two materially different repair options when credible; do not blindly implement the hypothesis.
[SELECTION CRITERIA]
Compare effectiveness, detection timing, determinism, scope, compatibility, cost, maintenance, AIGOV, and overengineering. Select the smallest complete solution.
[BOUNDED IMPLEMENTATION AUTHORITY]
Only after Scope Gate is authorized, use one focused branch. Do not merge or approve. Do not enable auto-merge, deploy, release, or modify repository settings.
[NON-GOALS]
No self-healing, automatic diagnosis/repair, broad framework, or downstream redesign. Do not request hidden chain-of-thought.
[VALIDATION REQUIREMENTS]
Run targeted/regression/negative tests, git diff --check, and applicable Schema/YAML/JSON checks; report observed results only.
[DRAFT PR REQUIREMENT]
Create one bounded Draft PR only after Scope and validation succeed.
[INDEPENDENT REVIEW REQUIREMENT]
Request a fresh independent exact-Head review. Any Head change makes prior review stale.
[FINAL RESPONSE FORMAT]
Return base/head, Scope, options, files, validations, Draft PR, enforcement limits, gaps, and merge_performed: false.
[STOP CONDITIONS]
Stop for unauthorized/insufficient Scope, conflict, overlap, unknown identity, broad/downstream change, or active-Run repository-write authority.
